Ensures that data recorded in durable http response are proper sizes
Test started
Network agent enabled

url: http://127.0.0.1:8000/inspector-protocol/resources/data-xfer-resource.php?cached=1
  isChunked: false
  isH2: false
  redirected: false
  headersSize: 101
  receivedDataSize: 0
  reportedTotalSize: 101
  durableMessage size: 0
  payload matches: true

url: http://127.0.0.1:8000/inspector-protocol/resources/data-xfer-resource.php?size=4&flush_header_with_x_bytes=1&wait_after_headers_packet=25&flush_every=1&wait_every_x_bytes=1&wait_duration_every_x_bytes=25
  isChunked: false
  isH2: false
  redirected: false
  headersSize: 171
  receivedDataSize: 4
  reportedTotalSize: 175
  durableMessage size: 4
  payload matches: true

url: http://127.0.0.1:8000/inspector-protocol/resources/data-xfer-resource.php?size=4000&flush_header_with_x_bytes=1&wait_after_headers_packet=25&flush_every=1000&wait_every_x_bytes=100&wait_duration_every_x_bytes=25
  isChunked: false
  isH2: false
  redirected: false
  headersSize: 174
  receivedDataSize: 4000
  reportedTotalSize: 4174
  durableMessage size: 4000
  payload matches: true
